column1: Table 1. Data on total MOB (layers 1-6 + periventricular zone).

Classification and species names were adapted to the list given by CORBET and HILL (1980). Names differing from those used in former papers and in STEPHAN et al. (1981a) are: 1 Aethechinus algirus. 2 Crocidura occidentalis, 3 Nesogale dobsoni, 4 Nesogale talazaci, 5 Chlorotalpa stuhlmanni, 6 Lemur fulvus, 7 Lemur variegatus, 8 Galago crassicaudatus, 9 Galago demidovii, 10 Saguinus tamarin, 11 Cercopithecus talapoin, 12 Rhynchocyon stuhlmanni.
n Number of individuals; 2* n is number of measured MOBs.
* In these species both sexes are present.
+ Figures slightly different from those given by STEPHAN et al. (1981a) because of re-examination and/or additional data.

The first N refers to the number of species (with more than one animal investigated) which were used to calculate the figures in column 3. The second N refers to the number of species (with one or more individuals) which were included to calculate the figures given in columns 4-6.
